  • Open

    McRib Returns to Select McDonald's Restaurants
    It's McRib season once again at McDonald's, but you can only find the barbecue sauce-slathered pork patty at participating locations in select regions. Cities where the McRib is available for a limited time include Miami, Dallas, Cleveland, St. Louis, Atlanta, Chicago, Seattle, Los Angeles, and more. The McRib features a seasoned boneless pork patty shaped like a rack of ribs and slathered in barbecue sauce and served with slivered onions and pickles on a toasted cornmeal-dusted roll. Prices vary, but the McRib costs $6.29 at my local McDonald's in Los Angeles. The combo, which includes the sandwich, medium fries, and a medium drink, costs $11.29. Photo via McDonald's.  Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Shake Shack's 2025 Holiday Shakes Arrive
    Shake Shack introduces two seasonal shakes for the 2025 holiday season: the Christmas Cookie Shake and the Sticky Toffee Pudding Shake. Available for a limited time, the shakes are inspired by traditional holiday desserts. The returning Christmas Cookie Shake features a sweet, buttery frozen custard blended with milk and topped with whipped cream and holiday sprinkles. The new Sticky Toffee Pudding Shake features sticky toffee pudding (a type of steamed cake) spun with vanilla frozen custard and caramelized brown sugar, topped with whipped cream and a drizzle of sticky toffee pudding sauce. Prices vary, but both holiday shakes cost $6.99 each here in the Los Angeles area. Photo via Shake Shack. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Taco Bell Unveils New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Featuring Poblano Peppers
    Taco Bell today announced the nationwide launch of its new Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla, featuring poblano peppers, at participating locations starting November 20, 2025. The Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla features marinated steak, fire-roasted poblano peppers, melty cheese blend, and Spicy Ranch sauce, all wrapped in a grilled flour tortilla. The new quesadilla will […] The post Taco Bell Unveils New Steak & Poblano Rolled Quesadilla Featuring Poblano Peppers appeared first on The Fast Food Post.  ( 19 min )

  • Open

    Krispy Kreme Updates Donut Menu with Nine New Flavors
    Krispy Kreme updates its donut menu with the addition of nine new flavors. Five of the donuts are permanent, while four are seasonal. The latest additions include: - New York Cheesecake - A donut dipped in vanilla-flavored icing, topped with graham crunch, and filled with cheesecake-flavored Kreme. - Oreo Cookies and Kreme - A donut filled with Oreo cookies & Kreme filling, dipped in chocolate icing, topped with Oreo cookie pieces and a drizzle of vanilla-flavored icing. - Original Glazed Cake - An old-fashioned cake donut covered in the chain's signature Original Glaze. - Cinnamon Apple Filled - A donut filled with apple cinnamon filling and tossed in a powdered cinnamon-flavored coating. - Original Glazed Kreme Filled Donut - An Original Glazed donut filled with Kreme filling. - Biscoff…  ( 16 min )
    Checkers & Rally's Introduces New $5 Pretzel Pubster Combo
    Checkers & Rally's launches its new $5 Pretzel Pubster Combo as the chain's latest value meal. The new Pretzel Pubster Burger features two beef patties, melted beer cheese with bacon crumbles, American cheese, mayo, and crispy onions, served on a toasted pretzel bun. The $5 meal also includes Famous Seasoned Fries and a small fountain drink (the burger by itself costs $3.99 near me in the Los Angeles area). The fast-food chain also offers a bigger take on a pretzel burger in the new BBQ Pretzel Buford. With a suggested price of $7.49, the burger features two large beef patties, American cheese, two bacon strips, crispy-fried onions, Sweet & Smoky BBQ sauce, and mayo, on a toasted pretzel bun. Checkers & Rally's is also offering Classic Wings for $1 each for the fall sports season. The bone-in wings are available plain or tossed in one of several sauces, including new Frank's Stingin' Honey Garlic Sauce, Medium Buffalo Sauce, Angry Buffalo Sauce, Garlic Parmesan Sauce, and Sweet & Smoky BBQ. Photo via Checkers & Rally's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Pizza Hut Brings Back Triple Treat Box for 2025 Holiday Season
    The Triple Treat Box is back at Pizza Hut for the 2025 holiday season. Available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide, the holiday-themed combo features two medium one-topping pizzas, five breadsticks, and 10 cinnamon sticks, all packed in limited-edition holiday packaging for $19.99 (may vary). The items can be swapped out and/or customized for an additional charge (like if you wanted an additional topping or a different dessert). Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Del Taco Puts Together New $2.99 Micro Meal
    Calling it a "bite-sized meal deal that proves good things really do come in small packages," Del Taco has launched the new Micro Meal priced at $2.99. Available for a limited time, the mini combo meal includes a Micro Beef & Cheddar Burrito, 7 to 10 Crinkle-Cut Fries, and a Donut Bite. The Micro Beef & Cheddar Burrito is a smaller version of the chain's Beef & Cheddar Burrito. It features seasoned beef, grated cheddar cheese, and zesty red sauce, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. The value-priced meal is available now at participating Del Taco locations chain-wide through November 23, 2025. Photo via Del Taco. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Peppermint Chip is Back at Chick-fil-A
    Peppermint Chip has returned to the Chick-fil-A menu for the 2025 holiday season. Chicken Tortilla Soup is also back for the winter. Chick-fil-A's returning Peppermint Chip lineup includes a trio of beverages: - Peppermint Chip Milkshake - Chick-fil-A's Icedream frozen dairy dessert blended with peppermint syrup and peppermint bark chips, topped with whipped cream and a maraschino cherry. - Peppermint Chip Frosted Coffee - Cold-brewed coffee, peppermint syrup, and peppermint bark chips blended with Icedream frozen dairy dessert. - Peppermint Iced Coffee - Cold-brewed coffee sweetened with pure cane syrup and peppermint syrup. Chicken Tortilla Soup is a winter staple for Chick-fil-A that features shredded chicken breast, navy beans, and black beans in a creamy white soup base with a blend of vegetables (including onions, corn, bell peppers, and celery) and spicy heat. It's served with seasoned corn tortilla strips for topping. Photo via Chick-fil-A. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Starbucks Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Starbucks has unveiled its 2025 holiday menu, featuring new and returning holiday food and beverages. Here's what you'll find on this year's menu: - Peppermint Mocha - Signature Espresso, steamed milk, mocha sauce, and peppermint-flavored syrup, topped with whipped cream and dark chocolate curls. It's available hot, iced, or as a Frappuccino. - Caramel Brulee Latte - Signature Espresso, steamed milk, and caramel brulee sauce, topped with whipped cream and caramel brulee topping. It's available hot, iced, or as a Frappuccino. - Iced Sugar Cookie Latte - Blonde Espresso, ice, 2% milk, and sugar cookie-flavored syrup, topped with red and green sprinkles. It's available hot, iced, or as a Frappuccino. - Iced Sugar Cookie Breve - A variant of the Iced Sugar Cookie Latte made with half-and-half…  ( 16 min )

    2025 Veterans Day Deals and Specials
    Tuesday, November 11, 2025, is Veterans Day, and to celebrate and honor the brave men and women of our armed services (past and present), many food and drink chains are offering Veterans Day promotions, so here's a list of 2025 Veterans Day deals and specials: - Applebee's - On November 11, all Active-Duty Military, Veterans, Reserves, and National Guard members can get a free full-sized entree (dine-in only) from an exclusive Veterans Day Menu. The 2025 Veterans Day Menu includes seven of Applebee's most popular entrees, including a 6-oz. Top Sirloin, Classic Bacon Cheeseburger, Chicken Tenders Platter, Double Crunch Shrimp, Fiesta Lime Chicken, Oriental Chicken Salad, and Three-Cheese Chicken Penne. Additionally, they will receive a $5 Bounce Back Card to redeem on their order within a …  ( 20 min )
    The Grand Papa Pizza Arrives at Papa Johns
    Papa Johns debuts its largest pizza yet with the launch of the new Grand Papa Pizza. The pizza chain also introduces a new dessert: the Salted Caramel Blondie. The 18" XXL pizza is made with the chain's original dough that's been hand-stretched into a thin crust. It comes topped with new deli pepperoni, a 3-cheese blend, and Italian seasoning. It's priced at $14.99. Papa Johns describes its deli pepperoni as larger than regular pepperoni with a milder, more savory flavor. The new Salted Caramel Blondie is a warm, buttery blondie made with brown sugar, caramel chips, and a touch of sea salt. It's priced at $9.49, but is also available as part of the Papa Pairings deal, where you can select two or more menu items for $6.99 each. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Crumbl Bakes New Dubai Chocolate Cheesecake and More Through November 15, 2025
    Crumbl introduces its new Dubai Chocolate Cheesecake and Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins as part of this week's rotation of cookies and desserts. Here's the Crumbl menu for the week ending November 15, 2025: - New Dubai Chocolate Cheesecake (pictured) - A chocolate cheesecake on a chocolate graham crust, topped with a crispy kataifi and pistachio filling, a drizzle of pistachio cream, and a whipped cream rosette. - New Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins - Thin, crispy cookies with caramelized edges, chewy centers, and semi-sweet chocolate chips. - Caramel Apple Cookie - A warm cinnamon apple cookie topped with caramel cream cheese frosting, chopped Granny Smith apples, a caramel drizzle, and a house-made streusel. - S'mores Cookie - A warm graham cracker cookie packed with milk chocolate chips and topped with a melty marshmallow, chocolate drizzle, and buttery graham cracker crumbs. - Snickerdoodle Cookie - A warm vanilla sugar cookie rolled in cinnamon-sugar. - Mint Chip Ice Cream Cookie - A chilled sugar cookie loaded with semi-sweet chips, topped with a creamy mint chip mousse and a whipped cream rosette. - Strawberry Cake Cookie - A warm strawberry and vanilla cookie topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting and white chocolate curls. - Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chunk Cookie - A warm cookie packed with semi-sweet chocolate chunks and a sprinkle of flaky sea salt. Crumbl also continues to offer a weekly "secret menu" that's a dessert or cookie selected by each location. You can check each location's secret menu item on the Crumbl website or mobile app. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Domino's Offers Large 1-Topping Carryout Pizzas for $6.70 Each
    Spurred by a viral meme, Domino's is offering a limited-time, online, carryout deal where you can get large 1-topping pizzas for $6.70 each using the code "67". The "67" (also "6-7") refers to a nonsensical meme that originated from the song "Doot Doot (6 7)" by Skrilla and gained popularity due to being featured on TikTok and Instagram Reels. It evolved into people just saying the phrase as slang with various meanings (or lack thereof), including as an inside joke where students cheer when they hear the words spoken (to the consternation of many a math teacher). The 67 deal compares well to Domino's regularly offered $7.99 large 1-topping carryout deal (it's an additional 17% discount) and is available through Sunday, November 16, 2025, at participating locations nationwide. In addition to keeping hip with the young folk with a viral deal, Domino's has just launched a rebrand that the pizza chain describes as, "We've taken inspiration from the past and present, and transformed it into modernized elements that will better reach future pizza lovers, including hotter colors, new packaging features a more simple, iconic approach and even a new jingle, "Dommmino’s," brought to life by hip-hop/country/Americana music star Shaboozey." You can see the changes to Domino's packaging, color palette, and more below: According to the brand's consumer research and testing, the new look "significantly improved consumers' perceptions of the brand as more vibrant/bold, fun/playful and modern." Additionally, 67% of consumers preferred the new rebrand over the previous design, with 73% of Gen Z and 70% of Millennials in favor of the new look. Photos via Domino's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    Review: McDonald's - Buffalo Ranch Sauce
    McDonald's new Buffalo Ranch sauce is described by the chain as "tangy meets creamy and mild-meets-wild as two iconic flavors come together to create something craveable." I got the sauce with a six-piece order of Chicken McNuggets. The Buffalo Ranch had a yellow-orange color to it. In terms of taste, it came off as a creamy Buffalo sauce. The ranch mostly contributed a creamy base and tang rather than any herby notes, which left the Buffalo sauce to add more tang as well as a light to medium heat. It went okay with the Chicken McNuggets, which have a more neutral profile compared to McDonald's McCrispy Strips. The tenders might have filled in better for the missing ranch notes. Overall, McDonald's Buffalo Ranch isn't terribly exciting, but it saves you the trouble of dipping chicken in Buffalo sauce and then ranch (or vice versa). Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Panera Introduces New Creme Brulee Bites
    In addition to the launch of its new Frozen Signature Hot Chocolate, Panera introduces new Creme Brulee Bites as a limited-time dessert that complements the Creme Brulee Latte, which debuted as part of this year's fall menu. The Creme Brulee Bite is a mini buttery vanilla cake topped with brown sugar streusel crumb and salted caramel sugar. It can be purchased individually or in a pack of three and is similar in concept to the bakery-cafe chain's regular menu Brownie Bites (a mini fudge brownie topped with chocolate chips and brownie crumbs. Prices vary, but a Creme Brulee Bite costs $1.99 at my local Panera branch here in Los Angeles, while a 3-pack costs $5. Panera is also offering a limited-time $1 soup deal where you can get a cup of soup for $1 with an in-app purchase of a whole entree using the code "SOUP" at participating locations. Photo via Panera. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    Papa Johns Offers 50% Off Carryout Pizzas Through November 16, 2025
    Papa Johns is offering a limited-time, carryout deal where you can get 50% off regular menu price pizzas. The discounted pizzas can be "any size, any crust, any toppings." The 50% off carryout pizza deal is available through November 16, 2025. For a sense of the savings, a large pepperoni pizza (one of the most commonly ordered pizzas) costs $18.99 at my local Papa Johns location. With the 50% off deal, the cost would be $9.50. Large specialty pizzas are $23.49, which would be $11.75 with the discount. Photo via Papa Johns. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    2025 National Fried Chicken Sandwich Day Deals and Specials
    November 9, 2025, is National Fried Chicken Sandwich Day. Here are some deals and specials to help celebrate the fast-food staple: - Buffalo Wild Wings - On November 9, 2025, Buffalo Wild Wings Rewards members can get a free Chicken Sandwich (Classic or Spicy) with a purchase of $10 or more. - Jollibee's - Through November 9, Original and Spicy Chicken Sandwiches will be buy one, get one free for new Jollibee Rewards members.  - KFC - From November 7 through November 9, 2025, rewards members can get a free Chicken Sandwich (Classic or Spicy) with any purchase of $1 or more made through the KFC website or mobile app. - McDonald's - On November 9, 2025, you can get a $2 McCrispy Sandwich using an offer in the McDonald's mobile app at participating locations nationwide. - Pollo Campero - In celebration of National Fried Chicken Sandwich Day and National Chicken Nugget Day (November 13), you can get chicken sandwiches and 6-piece nuggets for $5 each from November 9 through November 16, 2025. - Popeyes - Through November 9, you can get a free Chicken Sandwich (Classic, Spicy, or Smokin' Rojo) with a purchase of $10 or more at participating locations nationwide when you order through the Popeyes website or mobile app. - Wingstop - Through Sunday, November 9, you can get a free chicken sandwich in any flavor with a $10 purchase, using code "FREESANDWICH" at checkout in the Wingstop app or website. Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Taco Bell's Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie Arrives
    Ahead of Friendsgiving, Taco Bell introduces its new, limited-edition Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie, available in limited quantities nationwide, exclusively in-restaurant. The dessert is only available for purchase as a whole pie (not as slices) for $19.99. The Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie is a creamy, key-lime-style pie with a filling that's infused with the tropical-lime flavor of Baja Blast. The filling comes on a graham-crumb crust and is topped with whipped cream. Additionally, select Live Mas Cafes in Southern California and Texas have launched the Baja Blast Pie Chiller, a frozen drink twist on the Baja Blast Pie. Available for a limited time, the creamy frozen beverage features pieces of Mountain Dew Baja Blast Pie blended into a vanilla ice cream base, topped with whipped cream and churro crunch. The Baja Blast Pie Chiller carries a suggested price of $4.19 for a 16-oz small and $4.59 for a 20-oz medium. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Dairy Queen Welcomes 2025 Holiday Menu
    Dairy Queen rolls out its new Holiday Treat Collection for the 2025 holiday season. Available now for a limited time at participating locations nationwide, this year's holiday menu includes: - New Peppermint Bark Blizzard - The November Blizzard of the Month features peppermint bark pieces (white and milk chocolaty layers sprinkled with crushed peppermint candy cane) mixed with vanilla soft serve.  - Frosted Sugar Cookie Blizzard - The December Blizzard of the Month is a returning seasonal flavor that features soft sugar cookie pieces, icing, and festive sprinkles blended with vanilla soft serve. - New Holiday Nog Shake - Holiday Nog syrup blended with vanilla soft serve and milk, finished with whipped topping and a sprinkle of nutmeg. Photo via Dairy Queen. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

    McDonald's Offers $5 McGriddles Extra Value Meal and $8 Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal
    McDonald's introduces two limited-time Extra Value Meal offers this month: the $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal and the $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal. The $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal includes the sandwich, hash browns, and a small coffee. The $8 10-piece Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal includes 10 Chicken McNuggets, medium fries, and a medium fountain drink. McDonald's previous Extra Value Meal deals were the $5 Sausage McMuffin with Egg Extra Value Meal and the $8 Big Mac Extra Value Meal. Prices vary, but those meals are now $7.79 and $10.29, respectively, at my local McDonald's here in Los Angeles. The $8 Chicken McNuggets Extra Value Meal costs $9 here, while the $5 Sausage, Egg & Cheese McGriddles Extra Value Meal is $6. Photo via McDonald's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is Back at Select KFC Locations in California and Washington
    Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is back for the 2025 Thanksgiving season at select KFC locations in Northern California and Washington. Priced at $79.99, the turkey is a whole bird described as "tender, juicy, and deliciously prepared in our classic KFC style." The turkey is fully cooked but must be reheated. It is not available for online ordering or delivery (i.e., you have to either call or order in person). KFC's Cajun Deep Fried Turkey is also available in a Holiday Meal and a Holiday Feast. The Holiday Meal costs $109.99 and includes: A Cajun Deep Fried Turkey Family Size Mashed Potatoes Family Size Gravy Family Size Coleslaw 12 Biscuits The Holiday Feast costs $119.99 and includes:  A Cajun Deep Fried Turkey Family Size Mashed Potatoes Family Size Gravy Family Size Mac & Cheese Family Size Sweet Corn 12 Biscuits A Family Size Cake (Lemon or Chocolate) Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
    Taco Bell Tests $3 Chicken Queso Burrito
    Taco Bell is testing a new value item, the $3 Chicken Queso Burrito, for a limited time at participating locations in the Indianapolis area. The new Chicken Queso Burrito features grilled white-meat chicken, seasoned rice, green chile queso, a three-cheese blend, and pico de gallo, wrapped in a flour tortilla and grilled. The queso is also available with crispy tortilla chips for $2. The pairing is called "Chips N Queso." Taco Bell previously offered a limited-time green chile queso in March of this year as a dipping sauce for Crunchwrap Sliders. Taco Bell continues to test its Luxe Value Menu in the area, although the lineup no longer includes churros. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )
